description: Stage 3.3 v3: Training improvements on Era 6 stack. Mix of env-var-only capacity pushes (wider model, more layers) and implemented training patches (velocity gate, EMA distill, Muon→Adam switch). Recurrence is NOT in the base script — recurrence hypotheses require patches not yet written.

benchmarks.frontier_pr: PR #1487 (ndokutovich) SP8192 + Recur345 + Par7 + PreQuant TTT 10ep

screen.description: 1-GPU training screen. Lane A — full training runs.

slots.name: baseline_control_a
slots.why: Era 6 control with default hyperparameters. No patches.
slots.validates: The Era 6 base produces expected BPB range.
slots.falsifies: All comparisons invalid if control diverges.
notes: No recurrence or parallel residuals — base script doesn't support them yet.

slots.name: baseline_control_b
slots.validates: Short-run variance is low enough for screening.
notes: R0A vs R0B spread sets the kill threshold.

slots.name: wider_model_576d
slots.mechanism: Increase MODEL_DIM from 512 to 576. 12.5% more capacity per layer. All matrix dimensions scale quadratically. NUM_HEADS=8 still divides 576 (head_dim=72). Requires int4 embeddings to fit in 16MB.
slots.math: Body params per layer: 6 * 576^2 = 1,990,656. Total 11 layers: 21.9M params. At int6 (0.75 bytes): 16.4MB body. With int4 embeds (8192*576*0.5=2.4MB) + brotli: ~16MB total.
slots.placement: Env var only: MODEL_DIM=576. All shapes auto-derive.
slots.failure_modes: Artifact exceeds 16MB. Or head_dim=72 (not power-of-2) hurts flash attention. Or throughput loss from wider model outweighs capacity gain.
slots.why: Width scaling adds capacity to ALL layers simultaneously. More efficient than depth for this model size. The 16MB budget is the binding constraint — every BPB improvement is about squeezing more effective capacity into 16MB.
slots.kill_rule: Artifact doesn't fit in 16MB, or ms/step too slow to complete enough steps.
notes: Env var only — no patch needed.
EMBED_QUANT_BITS=4 requires int4_embed patch from stage3_1 to take effect. Without it, embeds stay int8 and artifact may exceed 16MB.

slots.name: 13_layer_model
slots.mechanism: Increase from 11 to 13 physical layers via NUM_LAYERS env var. More unique transformations. Needs narrower MLP (MLP_MULT=2.5) to fit budget.
slots.coefficients: NUM_LAYERS=13, MLP_MULT=2.5. Alternative: MLP_MULT=2 to guarantee fit.
slots.failure_modes: Doesn't fit in 16MB. Training too slow. Reduced MLP width hurts more than extra depth helps.
slots.why: Each unique layer adds genuinely new parameters vs recurrence (shared weights). Tests depth vs width tradeoff against H1.
slots.kill_rule: Doesn't fit in 16MB, or pre_quant_bpb worse than 11L at matched wallclock.
notes: Env var only — no patch needed.
EMBED_QUANT_BITS=4 requires int4_embed patch from stage3_1 to take effect. Without it, embeds stay int8 and artifact may exceed 16MB.
U-Net skip connections may need adjustment for odd layer count.

slots.name: velocity_warmdown_gate
slots.mechanism: Track EMA of loss velocity. While model is still improving fast, delay warmdown by holding scale=1.0. Cap delay at 20% of warmdown budget.
slots.math: v_t = 0.95 * v_{t-1} + 0.05 * (L_t - L_{t-1}). Gate: if v_t < -0.001 and delay < 0.2 * warmdown_iters, hold scale=1.0.
slots.placement: After lr_mul() computes scale. Wraps scale with conditional hold. Patch exists in patches.py:261.
slots.failure_modes: Loss velocity too noisy. Or velocity already near zero at default warmdown entry.
slots.why: Fixed warmdown may start too early when the model is still improving.
slots.kill_rule: Warmdown not delayed (velocity was already low), or val_bpb worse.
notes: Patch EXISTS in patches.py:261. Patch applies cleanly to base_train_gpt.py.

slots.name: muon_to_adam_late_switch
slots.mechanism: At scale < 0.25, switch matrix optimizer from Muon to fresh AdamW. Adam's per-parameter adaptive rates handle heterogeneous QAT convergence better than Muon's uniform orthogonal direction.
slots.math: At scale < 0.25: optimizer_matrix = AdamW(matrix_params, lr=current_lr, betas=(0.9, 0.999)). One-way switch.
slots.placement: In training loop at scale check. Patch exists in patches.py:335.
slots.shapes: Adam state: (m, v) per parameter. Muon state discarded.
slots.failure_modes: Adam cold-start needs ~100 steps. Or Muon is actually better for quant convergence.
slots.why: During QAT warmdown, different weights need different step sizes. Adam handles this; Muon doesn't.
slots.kill_rule: post_quant_bpb worse than R0A, or loss spikes after switch.
notes: Patch EXISTS in patches.py:335. Patch applies cleanly to base_train_gpt.py.

slots.name: ema_self_distillation
slots.mechanism: During warmdown, add KL(student || EMA) to loss. EMA is a trajectory-smoothed teacher that guides convergence and reduces oscillation.
slots.math: L_total = L_CE + 0.3 * KL(p_student || p_EMA). V=8192. Applied on micro_step==0 only (~6% overhead).
slots.placement: Inside training loop after CE forward. Patch exists in patches.py:449.
slots.shapes: Teacher logits: [B, T, 8192]. Student logits: [B, T, 8192]. KL: scalar.
slots.init: No new parameters. Uses existing EMA.
slots.failure_modes: EMA too close to training model — KL near zero. Or overhead costs more than smoothing gains.
slots.why: On Era 6, the optimization landscape is complex. EMA distillation is proven in semi-supervised learning but unexplored for LLM warmdown.
slots.kill_rule: No val_bpb improvement at screen, or overhead >15%.
notes: Patch EXISTS in patches.py:449. Patch applies cleanly to base_train_gpt.py.
